Title: QLNX - Main Implant Binary
Description: Quasar Linux RAT main ELF64 implant (quasar-implant). Executes filelessly via memfd_create+execveat and self-deletes from disk. Version 1.4.1.
RecommendedActions: Isolate host. Inspect /etc/ld.so.preload for malicious entries. Hunt QLNX_MANAGED string in systemd units crontab init.d .bashrc and .desktop files.

Title: QLNX - LD_PRELOAD Userland Rootkit
Description: QLNX LD_PRELOAD rootkit (libsecurity_utils.so.1). Hooks readdir/stat/open/fopen/access to hide implant files and processes from all userland tools.
RecommendedActions: Remove /usr/lib/libsecurity_utils.so.1 and clean /etc/ld.so.preload BEFORE killing the process or it will immediately respawn.

Title: QLNX - PAM Inline-Hook Backdoor
Description: QLNX PAM backdoor (pam_security.so). Intercepts plaintext credentials at every auth event. Contains hardcoded master password. Logs to /var/log/.ICE-unix and /var/log/.Test-unix.
RecommendedActions: Remove pam_security.so and clean /etc/ld.so.preload. Review /var/log/.ICE-unix and /var/log/.Test-unix. Rotate ALL credentials used on this host.

Title: QLNX - Rootkit C Source Dropper
Description: QLNX rootkit C source (hide_src_39ZzHo.c) written to /tmp then compiled via gcc and deleted. Intermediate artifact indicating rootkit installation.
RecommendedActions: Investigate gcc compilation events on host. Check for /usr/lib/libsecurity_utils.so.1 and malicious entries in /etc/ld.so.preload.

Title: QLNX - PAM Backdoor C Source Dropper
Description: QLNX PAM backdoor C source (pam_src_51YyC3.c) written to /tmp then compiled via gcc and deleted. Intermediate artifact indicating PAM backdoor installation.
RecommendedActions: Investigate gcc compilation events on host. Check for /usr/lib/pam_security.so and entries in /etc/ld.so.preload.

Title: QLNX - PAM Credential Logger
Description: QLNX PAM credential logger (.libpam_cache.so). Loaded into every dynamically linked process. Captures service/username/auth token to /tmp/.pam_cache on every successful auth.
RecommendedActions: Remove /usr/lib/.libpam_cache.so and clean /etc/ld.so.preload. Review /tmp/.pam_cache contents. Treat all credentials on this host as compromised.

Title: QLNX - PAM Logger C Source Dropper
Description: QLNX PAM logger C source (pcs_a3kf9x.c) written to /tmp then compiled via gcc and deleted. Intermediate artifact indicating PAM credential logger installation.
RecommendedActions: Investigate gcc compilation events on host. Check for /usr/lib/.libpam_cache.so and entries in /etc/ld.so.preload.

Title: QLNX - Main Implant Binary (SHA1)
Description: Quasar Linux RAT main implant SHA1 hash. ELF 64-bit x86-64 147.91 KB. Alternate hash for the quasar-implant binary.
RecommendedActions: Isolate host. Inspect /etc/ld.so.preload. Hunt QLNX_MANAGED in systemd units crontab init.d .bashrc and .desktop autostart files.
